keywords: ET WEB_CLIENT Apple Quicktime RTSP Content-Type overflow attempt

traffic-6a1d8016.content:
pcap=/tmp/tmp87k371w4.pcap
protocol=TCP
src=192.168.56.10:41006 dst=10.0.0.20:80
http=GET /search?q=<script>alert('xss')</script>
headers={'Host': 'vuln.local'}
payload=GET /search?q=<script>alert('xss')</script> HTTP/1.1
Host: vuln.local

HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Content-Length: 2

OK
traffic-6a1d8016.intent: 检测针对Web应用的反射型XSS攻击尝试，攻击者通过注入恶意脚本试图在用户浏览器执行代码，属于初始访问阶段的漏洞利用
